scripts.api:all: yarn api:clear && yarn api:fetch-unpack && yarn api:validate && yarn api:bundle && yarn api:generate
scripts.mock:sync: yarn api:fetch-unpack && yarn mock:gen:errors && yarn mock:gen
scripts.dev:stub: yarn mock:sync && concurrently --names "MOCK,NODE,ANGULAR" -c "bgMagenta.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "yarn start:mock" "yarn start:dev" "yarn watch"
scripts.test: npx if-env CI=true && exit 0 || yarn test:unit
scripts.test:functional: CYPRESS_TAGS=@smoke cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' || CODE=$? ; mkdir -p functional-output/chrome/smoke/cucumber-json functional-output/chrome/smoke/mochawesome && cp cypress/reports/cucumber-json/cucumber-report.json functional-output/chrome/smoke/cucumber-json/ 2>/dev/null || true ; cp -r cypress/reports/screenshots cypress/reports/junit functional-output/chrome/smoke/ 2>/dev/null || true ; yarn mochawesome-merge 'cypress/reports/mochawesome/*.json' -o functional-output/chrome/smoke/mochawesome/mochawesome.json 2>/dev/null || true ; yarn marge functional-output/chrome/smoke/mochawesome/mochawesome.json -f mochawesome -o functional-output/chrome/smoke/mochawesome 2>/dev/null || true ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.test:nightly:smoke:chrome: CYPRESS_TAGS=@smoke cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' || CODE=$? ; mkdir -p functional-output/chrome/smoke/cucumber-json && cp cypress/reports/cucumber-json/cucumber-report.json functional-output/chrome/smoke/cucumber-json/ 2>/dev/null || true ; cp -r cypress/reports/screenshots cypress/reports/junit cypress/reports/mochawesome functional-output/chrome/smoke/ 2>/dev/null || true ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.test:nightly:regression:chrome: CYPRESS_TAGS='@regression and not @ignore and not @broken' cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' || CODE=$? ; mkdir -p functional-output/chrome/regression/cucumber-json && cp cypress/reports/cucumber-json/cucumber-report.json functional-output/chrome/regression/cucumber-json/ 2>/dev/null || true ; cp -r cypress/reports/screenshots cypress/reports/junit cypress/reports/mochawesome functional-output/chrome/regression/ 2>/dev/null || true ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.test:parallel:smoke:chrome: cypress-parallel -s cypress:run:smoke:chrome -d 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' -t 4 || CODE=$? ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/merge-parallel-reports.js smoke chrome ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/generate-cucumber-html-report.js chrome smoke ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.test:parallel:regression:chrome: cypress-parallel -s cypress:run:regression:chrome -d 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' -t 4 || CODE=$? ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/merge-parallel-reports.js regression chrome ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/generate-cucumber-html-report.js chrome regression ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.test:parallel:all: cypress-parallel -s cypress:run:all -d 'cypress/e2e/features/**/*.feature' -t 4 || CODE=$? ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/merge-parallel-reports.js all chrome ; node cypress/scripts/reporting/generate-cucumber-html-report.js chrome all ; exit ${CODE:-0}
scripts.cichecks: yarn api:all && yarn build && yarn lint && yarn test && yarn test:routes && yarn test:a11y
scripts.cypress:run:regression:chrome: cypress run --browser chrome --env TAGS='@regression and not @ignore and not @broken'
scripts.cypress:run:all: cypress run --browser chrome --env TAGS='@regression and not @ignore and not @broken'
scripts.cypress:clean:reports: rimraf cypress/reports/cucumber-json cypress/reports/mochawesome cypress/reports/parallel cypress/reports/screenshots runner-results
